status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
notes: See also registry/entity/sg/gov/mas.json for the regulator itself.

data.notes: Last major revision January 18, 2021 (with subsequent advisories). Non-statutory but supervisory-expectation guidelines covering technology risk governance, system resilience, and cyber hygiene for financial institutions.

Sets expectations for outsourcing/cloud arrangements by financial institutions, with 'material outsourcing' triggering stricter obligations (audit rights, annual review). As of March 2026, MAS has a consultation paper proposing to supersede these with broader Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM) Guidelines covering all FIs relying on third parties, not just those with formal outsourcing arrangements.
